/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/IVIQuickTest.dir/IVIQuickTest_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IVIQuickTest.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IVIQuickTest.dir/src/AppManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IVIQuickTest.dir/IVIQuickTest_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_qml.cpp.o -o IVIQuickTest -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtQuick.framework/QtQuick /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtQmlModels.framework/QtQmlModels /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtQml.framework/QtQml /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtNetwork.framework/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
